ddls:
CREATE TABLE "production_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production run */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the production line where the run occurred */,
  "replicate" INTEGER /* The replicate number of the production run */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side of the product being measured (e.g., Left, Right) */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of the production run */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of product being manufactured */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the production run */,
  "production_line_shift" TEXT /* Production line shift */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Operator responsible for the production run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_runs_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_runs_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production run */,
  "mnm1" REAL /* Measurement metric 1 minimum value */,
  "mnm2" REAL /* Measurement metric 2 minimum value */,
  "mnm3" REAL /* Measurement metric 3 minimum value */,
  "mnp4" REAL /* Measurement metric 4 (not applicable) value */,
  "mxm1" REAL /* Measurement metric 1 maximum value */,
  "mxm2" REAL /* Measurement metric 2 maximum value */,
  "mxm3" REAL /* Measurement metric 3 maximum value */,
  "mxp3" REAL /* Measurement metric 3 (post) value */,
  "mxp4" REAL /* Measurement metric 4 (post) value */,
  "measurement_side" TEXT /* Side of the product being measured */,
  "measurement_tool_id" INTEGER /* Measurement tool used */,
  "measurement_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the measurement was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_metrics_measurement_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_tool_id") REFERENCES measurement_tools ("measurement_tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production line */,
  "production_line_type" TEXT /* Type of production line */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the production line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality standard */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of product the standard applies to */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum acceptable value for the product quality */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum acceptable value for the product quality */,
  "standard_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_standards_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defects" (
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production run */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the defect */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the defect */,
  "defect_category" TEXT /* Category of the defect */,
  "defect_status" TEXT /* Status of the defect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was taken */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production run for which the report was generated */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date of report generation */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corrective_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corrective action */,
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defect related to the corrective action */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken to rectify the defect */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the corrective action */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the corrective action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback */,
  "feedback_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "product_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "product_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "operator_department" TEXT /* Department of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_tools" (
  "measurement_tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement tool */,
  "measurement_tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement tool */,
  "measurement_tool_description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_tool_id")
)
